_comment: Illustrative cache-control policy for a static site. Long-lived, immutable caching for content-hashed assets; short/no-cache for HTML and feeds so content deploys go live promptly. Adapt to your provider's syntax.

rules.note: Content-hashed filenames — safe to cache for a year; a new build gets new URLs.
Stable URLs — keep short so content changes appear without waiting on a long TTL.
